Notice Of Motion And Motion By Pltf B.A.R. Contractors, Inc. To Compel Defts' Further Written Responses To And Documents Productions For Pltf'S First Set Of Requests And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
Plaintiff B.A.R. Contranctors, Inc.'s Motion to compel further written responses to and document production for plaintiff's first set of production of documents and request for monetary sanctions:
1. As to request for production nos. 16, 37 and 41 propounded individually to defendants Glometro, Inc., Nancy Ho-Belli, East-West Bank, and East-West Investment, Inc., granted in part:
a. Defendants need not produce any personal financial statements, bank statements or tax information of the individual defendant Nancy Ho Belli or any other individual guarantor or co-signor of any loan related to these requests;
b. Defendants need not produce any document identified as attorney-client, or attorney work product privileged; provided that each responding party shall produce a code compliant privilege log as to matters claimed as privileged;
c. Any otherwise relevant and responsive documents which contain personal information of an individual defendant or guarantor-such as social security number, driver's license, or the like-may be redacted to mask that information prior to production;
2. Each responding defendant shall serve a verified supplemental response, produce all responsive documents, and a privilege log within five days of notice of entry of this order;
3. Request for sanctions denied.
Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
